title: Upload Your Documents
titleLarge: Drop in handbooks, manuals, policies—Sidekick's AI automatically classifies and indexes everything
desc: Upload employee handbooks, training manuals, safety procedures, and policies. Our AI automatically organizes and indexes everything for instant retrieval.
shortDesc: Upload your company documents and let Sidekick's AI organize them automatically.

title: Workers Text Questions
titleLarge: Employees simply text their questions to Sidekick—in any language, even via voice memo
desc: No app downloads, no training required. Workers simply text their questions to Sidekick in their preferred language—English, Spanish, Korean, and 10+ more.
shortDesc: Workers text questions in any language—no app needed, just SMS.

title: Get Instant Answers
titleLarge: Sidekick responds in seconds with accurate answers pulled directly from your approved documents
desc: Workers get accurate, instant answers in under 2 seconds. Every response is sourced from your approved company documents—no hallucinations, no guessing.
shortDesc: Instant, accurate answers sourced from your company documents.

title: Managers Get Insights
titleLarge: See trending questions, identify training gaps, and take action before small issues become big problems
desc: Our AI analyzes question patterns to detect training gaps, flag struggling employees, and suggest documentation improvements—all in a simple dashboard.
shortDesc: AI-powered insights help managers spot problems before they grow.
